scripts.build: cat src/clrUtils.js src/clrSpaces.js src/clrGen.js src/docGen.js src/figmaVars.js src/config.js src/main.js > scripts.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs');let html=fs.readFileSync('src/ui.html','utf8');html=html.replace(/<script src=\"src\\/([^\"]+)\"><\\/script>/g,(_,f)=>'<script>\\n'+fs.readFileSync('src/'+f,'utf8')+'\\n</script>');fs.writeFileSync('ui.html',html);"
